topics.name: 100 - 200 Level: Engineering Mechanics and Thermodynamics
topics.description: Applied Mechanics, Engineering Materials, Engineering Drawing, and Thermodynamics I.

subtopics.name: MEE 201: Engineering Thermodynamics I
objectives: State 1st and 2nd Laws of Thermodynamics and apply energy balance to open and closed systems
Analyze Carnot, Rankine, Otto, Diesel, and Brayton thermodynamic cycles

subtopics.name: MEE 202: Fluid Mechanics I and Strength of Materials
objectives: Apply hydrostatics, Bernoulli's equation, and continuity equation to fluid flow
Calculate shear force, bending moment, stress, strain, and torsion in structural elements

topics.name: 300 Level: Machine Design, Heat Transfer, Manufacturing, and SIWES
topics.description: MEE 301 Machine Component Design, Heat Transfer, Manufacturing Technology, and SIWES.

subtopics.name: MEE 301: Machine Element Design
objectives: Design gears, shafts, bearings, belts, clutches, brakes, and threaded fasteners

subtopics.name: MEE 302: Heat and Mass Transfer
objectives: Calculate steady and unsteady conduction, free/forced convection, and radiation heat transfer
Design heat exchangers using Log Mean Temperature Difference (LMTD) and NTU methods

topics.name: 400 - 500 Level: Control Engineering, Mechatronics, CAD/CAM, and B.Eng. Project
topics.description: Internal Combustion Engines, Control Systems, CAD/CAM, Renewable Energy, and Thesis.

subtopics.name: MEE 501: CAD/CAM, Robotics, and Mechatronics
objectives: Use 3D CAD modeling (SolidWorks/AutoCAD) and Computer Aided Manufacturing (CNC programming)
Integrate hydraulic/pneumatic actuators, sensors, and microcontrollers for mechatronic automation

subtopics.name: MEE 599: Final Year Mechanical Engineering Design Project
objectives: Design, fabricate, and test original mechanical machine prototype and defend before NSE/COREN panel
